titleEn: Casey’s expansion targets growth with pizza, wings
titleZh: Casey's便利店扩张计划：聚焦披萨与鸡翅，数字化与AI助力运营
summaryZh: Casey's便利店宣布三年扩张计划，新增至少400家门店，重点发展披萨、鸡翅等即食食品，并利用AI和数字化工具优化厨房运营、库存管理和订单流程。虽然该新闻主要涉及零售和快餐行业，但其在AI辅助生产规划、库存优化、数字化订单简化等方面的实践，对智慧畜牧行业在自动化、数据驱动决策和供应链管理方面有一定参考价值。
featuredReason: 虽然新闻主体是零售业，但其中AI辅助生产规划、库存优化和数字化订单简化的实践，为智慧畜牧行业在自动化、数据驱动决策和供应链管理方面提供了跨行业借鉴思路。
contentFull: ANKENY, IOWA — Pizza, chicken wings, baked foods and hot sandwiches will play key roles in a three-year plan that Casey’s General Stores Inc. revealed June 25. The convenience store chain plans to add at least 400 stores over the next three years as it will continue to invest in made-to-order offerings, including pizza and chicken wings, with plans to expand its private brand portfolio.Casey’s operates about 3,000 convenience stores in 19 states and is the fifth largest pizza chain in the United States, according to the company.Same-store sales for Casey’s pizza increased 5% in fiscal-year 2026. Pizza whole pie unit volume is increasing by double-digit percentages in about 40% of Casey’s stores. In other Casey’s food categories, hot lunch sandwich sales had a 36% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over the past three years followed by bakery items with an 8% CAGR over the three years and dispensed beverages at a 5% CAGR over the three years.“Over 70% of guest visits are non-fuel,” said Thomas Brennan, chief merchandising officer, in a Casey’s investor day on June 24. “Dinner is a meaningful and growing daypart, and on-trend categories like energy drinks continue to grow at a strong pace. The result is a structurally advantaged model with more ways to win across dayparts and more opportunities to drive trips.”About 50% of Casey’s stores do not have a national pizza or wing chain competitor within 5 miles, according to the company.“Roughly two-thirds of Casey’s stores are in towns of 20,000 people or fewer, giving us a strong market position in rural areas,” said Darren Rebelez, president and chief executive officer.Casey’s also will invest in technology and data-driven tools to improve how employees prepare food, serve guests and run stores efficiently. In digital sales, Casey’s has reduced the clicks required to order a pizza to three from 11.“Another way we can support the kitchens is by leveraging technology and our AI tools,” said Ena Williams, chief operating officer. “Using technology to improve our ingredient ordering process for both accuracy and inventory management is a priority for our strategic plan. In addition to improving our ordering processes, we will continue to leverage technology to improve production planning for our grab-and-go items, as well as optimize our made-to-order systems to have items like our pizza ready when the guests expect them.”
translationZh:
爱荷华州安克尼——披萨、鸡翅、烘焙食品和热三明治将在Casey's General Stores Inc.于6月25日公布的三年计划中扮演关键角色。这家便利店连锁计划在未来三年内新增至少400家门店，同时将继续投资于定制化产品，包括披萨和鸡翅，并计划扩大其自有品牌组合。

据该公司称，Casey's在19个州经营约3000家便利店，是美国第五大披萨连锁店。

在2026财年，Casey's的披萨同店销售额增长了5%。在约40%的Casey's门店中，整张披萨的单位销量以两位数的百分比增长。在Casey's的其他食品类别中，热午餐三明治的销售额在过去三年实现了36%的复合年增长率，烘焙食品的复合年增长率为8%，饮料的复合年增长率为5%。

“超过70%的顾客到访是非加油目的，”Casey's首席商品官Thomas Brennan在6月24日的投资者日上表示。“晚餐是一个重要且不断增长的时段，而像能量饮料这样的流行品类继续强劲增长。其结果是一个结构性优势模式，让我们在一天中的各个时段有更多获胜方式，并有更多机会增加客流量。”

据该公司称，约50%的Casey's门店在5英里范围内没有全国性的披萨或鸡翅连锁竞争对手。

“大约三分之二的Casey's门店位于人口不超过2万的小镇，这使我们在农村地区拥有强大的市场地位，”总裁兼首席执行官Darren Rebelez说。

Casey's还将投资于技术和数据驱动工具，以改善员工准备食物、服务顾客和高效运营门店的方式。在数字销售方面，Casey's已将订购披萨所需的点击次数从11次减少到3次。

“支持厨房的另一种方式是利用技术和我们的AI工具，”首席运营官Ena Williams说。“利用技术改进我们的食材订购流程，提高准确性和库存管理，是我们战略计划的优先事项。除了改进订购流程，我们还将继续利用技术改善即取即走物品的生产计划，并优化我们的定制化系统，使披萨等产品在顾客期望的时间准备好。”
contentHtml: The convenience store chain plans to add at least 400 stores.
